message:
test(proptest): add 16 property tests for evidence, telemetry, and snapshot engine

ARS evidence (6 new, 16→22 total): EvidenceEntry serde roundtrip (synthetic +
ledger-produced), LedgerDigest serde roundtrip (synthetic + real ledger),
ChainVerification serde roundtrip (synthetic + real ledger).

Telemetry (8 new, 37→45 total): TelemetryConfig serde+Default, MetricPoint serde
roundtrip + tags + skip_serializing_if, TelemetrySnapshot serde + with_resource,
HourlyAggregate serde roundtrip.

Snapshot engine (2 new, 37→39 total): SnapshotEngineTelemetrySnapshot serde
roundtrip + JSON key validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
